patches.hypothesis: The `_verifyRelease` method was not able to detect the correct exception when the released buffer was smaller than the original buffer. The `if` condition checking for the buffer sizes was not working correctly.
patches.changes:
- if ((toRelease != src) && (toRelease.length <= src.length)) { throw wrongBuf(); }
+ if ((toRelease != src) && (toRelease.length > src.length)) { throw wrongBuf(); }
